reviews.comment:
No son capas de ofrecerte limpiar los vidrios  , la elegi solo por tener la serviclub. En la shell de mas adelante te atienden como si fueras el "jefe"

(Translated by Google)
They're not even capable of cleaning your windows; I only chose this one because it has the Serviclub membership. At the Shell station further down the road, they treat you like you're the boss.
